CommunityApplications.Profile:
GeoMetrikks Unraid templates - a real-time nginx access log GeoIP analytics tool with a live traffic map, built with Litestar and TimescaleDB+PostGIS.
This repository ships two Docker templates: - **geometrikks** - the main application and web UI - **geometrikks-timescaledb** - the companion TimescaleDB+PostGIS database
Install the database template first, then the app template, using a matching password between the two. See the [README](https://github.com/GilbN/geometrikks-unraid-template) for full setup instructions. Support and bug reports: https://github.com/GilbN/geometrikks/issues
